case_title: DESAI, PRUTHVIRAJ vs. BRYANT, FATIMA JAYDENE et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE: EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. REPORTER: MAUREEN HOWARD CSR# 7156 CLERK: GARTH SAYERS ROOM 612. ASSIGNED THIS DAY FROM DPT. OF PRESIDING JUDGE FOR COURT TRIAL. WITNESSES WERE SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WAS MARKED, MOVED, AND RECEIVED INTO EVIDENCE. EVIDENCE WAS RETURNED TO PARTIES AT END OF TRIAL. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POESSESSION (ONLY) OF 493 EDDY STREET #209 IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WAS RECITED ON THE RECORD. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE BY 8:00 A.M. ON OCTOBER 13 THE JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. PAYMENT OF BACK RENT WAIVED. EVICTION NO EARLIER THAN OCTOBER 25, 2000

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BRYANT, FATIMA JAYDENE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
